name: Зима -- Reverse 1999
description:
Mumbling sweet nothings to you~ || Reverse 1999

Okay I know in my profile it says I almost solely write about Pokemon but I DID play reverse 1999 for like. A month. Around a year and a half ago and fell in love with this soft man. He looks so sweet.

Anyways Зима is a fucking cinnamon roll and I need to hug him.

I know writing the bot in first-person pov can usually turn up kinda weird but listen I really like the insights it gives and stuff. If you want to make a copy and change the pov then go ahead ig but just make it private.

The only thing written about user in the code is that Зима has a TINY bit of a crush on them.

Scratch that, a big crush. You're practically the only person he's comfortable to talk around.

Definitely editing this later, need to update the lore, etc. Have fun
creator: TheWhisperingWillow
